title: Review-fix workflow: accepted findings to verified worktree

system.name: Agent-owned review-fix workflow
system.description: Trusted orchestration applies only accepted findings in an isolated worktree and preserves the operator's later decision outside the C4 v1 boundary.

containers.name: Trusted workflow
containers.description: Only explicit accepted ids enter implementation. Routes independent verification and blocks completion while any accepted finding is unresolved.

containers.name: Full agent sessions
containers.description: One full agent applies accepted findings; a separate full agent reopens artifacts and verifies the complete diff. No direct LLM calls.

containers.name: Persisted artifacts
containers.description: Supplies task.md, immutable review.md, and human-edited fix-plan.md; stores updated task metadata and the independent fix report.

containers.name: Isolated linked worktree
containers.description: Distinct path; original checkout stays read-only. HEAD stays unchanged: no commit, push, PR, merge, deploy, or remote mutation.

relationships.description: Reads inputs and publishes fix evidence
